name: G-SHARE: A Guideline-Based Structured Reasoning Framework for Human-Factor Event Diagnosis

description: arXiv:2607.11892v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Human-factor event diagnosis is essential for learning from operational events in nuclear power plants, yet its quality depends strongly on expert interpretation of narrative reports and guideline-based reasoning.Existing data-driven or one-shot large language model approaches often lack structured reasoning, have limited alignment with formal d...
author: Xingyu Xiao, Mao Du, Jiejuan Tong, Jingang Liang, Haitao Wang
